sellers_note: LUXURIOUS, COMMANDING, ELEGANT, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, OFF-LEASE, NONSMOKER, EXCEPTIONAL! The 2016 Mercedes-Benz S 550 4MATIC Coupe represents the pinnacle of grand touring luxury, combining breathtaking styling, effortless V8 performance, cutting-edge technology, and world-class craftsmanship into a stunning two-door flagship. Equipped with Mercedes-Benz's renowned 4MATIC all-wheel-drive system, this coupe delivers confident year-round capability while surrounding its occupants with the refinement and sophistication expected from the S-Class. The Best or Nothing is more than a slogan here ... it is the philosophy that shaped every aspect of this remarkable automobile. Unlike many luxury coupes that prioritize styling over comfort or performance over refinement, the S 550 Coupe excels at virtually everything. Compared with rivals such as the BMW 650i xDrive Coupe, Bentley Continental GT V8, and Lexus LC's predecessor luxury offerings, the S-Class Coupe delivers an extraordinary blend of ride comfort, isolation, craftsmanship, technology, and long-distance touring capability. Its pillarless coupe design and flagship-level engineering make it one of the most distinctive luxury coupes of its era. The critics showed up with notebooks ... and left sounding like admirers. Car and Driver praised the S-Class Coupe for its exceptional luxury and refinement. Edmunds highlighted its world-class interior craftsmanship and effortless performance. Frequently regarded as one of the finest luxury coupes ever produced. Praised for combining flagship luxury-sedan technology with dramatic coupe styling. Recognized for outstanding ride quality and long-distance comfort. Commended for its twin-turbocharged V8 performance and refined driving experience. Widely considered a benchmark grand-touring luxury coupe. Frequently recommended as one of the most desirable Mercedes-Benz models of its generation. Certain warranty transferability provisions could not be independently verified and have therefore been omitted. With its odometer hovering around the 53,169-mile mark, it has a long way to go! Want to extend its warranty coverage? In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! This S-Class Coupe is packed with enough luxury, craftsmanship, innovation, and comfort to remind you exactly why Mercedes-Benz created an entire flagship model range around the letter S. These carefully selected factory options elevate this already extraordinary flagship coupe into something even more exclusive, combining enhanced luxury, technology, comfort, and driver-assistance features. Sport Package Sport Body Styling -- Enhances the coupe's visual presence with more aggressive exterior design elements. Premium 1 Package Head-Up Display -- Projects key driving information within the driver's line of sight. Active Multi-Contour Seats with Massage -- Provides enhanced support and relaxation. Front Variable Heated Seats Plus -- Delivers expanded heating coverage for greater comfort. Surround View Camera -- Enhances visibility around the vehicle during low-speed maneuvers. Driver Assistance Package DISTRONIC PLUS -- Adaptive cruise-control functionality for enhanced highway comfort. Steering Assist -- Helps support lane-centering functions. PRE-SAFE Brake -- Assists with collision mitigation. BAS PLUS with Cross Traffic Assist -- Helps detect and respond to crossing traffic. Active Blind Spot Assist -- Enhances lane-change awareness. Active Lane Keeping Assist -- Helps maintain lane position. Speed Limit Assist -- Displays posted speed-limit information. PRE-SAFE PLUS -- Helps prepare occupants in certain collision scenarios. Warmth & Comfort Package Heated Rear Seats -- Enhances rear-passenger comfort. Heated Steering Wheel -- Provides additional cold-weather comfort.
